steps.title: Write the time equation
steps.content:
The total trip took $3$ hours. Since $x$ is highway time and $y$ is local-street time, the time equation is:
$$x+y=3$$

steps.title: Write the distance equation
steps.content:
Distance equals rate times time. The highway distance is $60x$, and the local-street distance is $30y$. The total distance is $150$ miles.
$$60x+30y=150$$
